properties.Test Case: Something to test "Page Type" Note: from the Bloom docs, "Typically, the spreadsheet will be imported back into the original book or into a duplicate of the original. In this way, the original structure of each page will be maintained. You can also into a spreadsheet into a new blank book. In this case, however, the original page structure will not be maintained. "
properties.Steps:
Something to test "Page Type"
Note: from the Bloom docs, "Typically, the spreadsheet will be imported back into the original book or into a duplicate of the original. In this way, the original structure of each page will be maintained. You can also into a spreadsheet into a new blank book. In this case, however, the original page structure will not be maintained. "
